issues.description: Condition should be 'Always', not 'HasRestingDon'. The effect text describes a cost (DON!! −1) that is optional/payable, not a conditional requirement. The DSL should reflect that the play action is available unconditionally, with the DON cost being a separate payment mechanic not modeled in condition logic.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] DON!! −1: Play up to 1 [Page One] card with a cost of 4 or less from your hand.
